description_long: This object is a sleek, modern kitchen knife with a long, narrow, and sharply pointed blade, ideal for slicing or filleting. The blade is straight-edged and tapers to a fine point, suggesting precision cutting capabilities. The handle is ergonomically shaped, slightly contoured for grip, and appears to be made from the same material as the blade, giving it a seamless, monolithic look. The entire knife is finished in a matte black color, with no visible ornamentation or branding. There is no visible guard between the blade and handle, emphasizing a minimalist design. The knife's construction suggests it is both lightweight and durable, suitable for urban kitchen environments.
description: A sleek, matte black kitchen knife with a long, pointed blade and a seamless, contoured handle. The design is minimalist and modern, with no visible ornamentation.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the knife, highlighting the straight, narrow blade and the contoured handle.
description_view_1: Front-on view displaying the thin profile of the blade and the ergonomic curve of the handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the full length and the seamless transition between blade and handle.
description_view_3: Rear view emphasizing the width of the blade and the handle's end, with the blade's taper visible.
